events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Queen's legendary guitarist, Brian May, celebrates his 79th birthday.

angles.name: Brian May Birthday
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 79th birthday to the iconic Queen guitarist, astrophysicist, and all-round legend, Brian May! What's your favourite May riff?

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The Rolling Stones' frontman, Mick Jagger, celebrates his 83rd birthday.

angles.name: Mick Jagger Birthday
angles.copy: Still got the moves like Jagger! Happy 83rd birthday to the one and only Sir Mick Jagger, the enduring voice and energy of The Rolling Stones.

events.title: MTV launched 45 years ago
events.blurb: Music Television (MTV) first launched on August 1, 1981, with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' as its inaugural music video.

angles.name: MTV Launch Anniversary
angles.copy: 45 years ago today, MTV launched with the aptly named 'Video Killed The Radio Star'. It changed music and TV forever – what was your favourite MTV moment?

events.title: Oasis' 'Definitely Maybe' released 32 years ago
events.blurb: Oasis released their seminal debut album, 'Definitely Maybe', on August 29, 1994, which became a defining record of the Britpop era.

angles.name: Definitely Maybe Anniversary
angles.copy: 32 years since Oasis dropped 'Definitely Maybe' and changed the sound of a generation. Still sounds as fresh and vital as ever. What's your top track from the album?

events.title: Woodstock Festival began 57 years ago
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Music & Art Fair, an iconic event of the 1960s counterculture, kicked off on August 15, 1969, in Bethel, New York.

angles.name: Woodstock Anniversary
angles.copy: 57 years ago, half a million people gathered for '3 Days of Peace & Music' at Woodstock. A truly iconic moment in music history.

events.title: Anniversary of Elvis Presley's passing
events.blurb: Today marks 49 years since the death of Elvis Presley, who would have been 91 this year.

angles.name: Elvis Tribute
angles.copy: Remembering The King, Elvis Presley, 49 years on. His music and legacy continue to inspire generations. He would have been 91 today.

events.title: Anniversary of Tupac Shakur's passing
events.blurb: Today marks 30 years since the death of hip-hop icon Tupac Shakur, who would have been 55 this year.

angles.name: Tupac Tribute
angles.copy: Remembering Tupac Shakur, 30 years after his untimely passing. A voice that defined a generation and continues to resonate today. He would have been 55.

events.title: Anniversary of Jimi Hendrix's passing
events.blurb: Today marks 56 years since the death of guitar legend Jimi Hendrix, who would have been 84 this year.

angles.name: Jimi Hendrix Tribute
angles.copy: 56 years ago, the world lost a true guitar visionary, Jimi Hendrix. His innovative playing changed music forever. He would have been 84 today.

events.title: The Beatles' 'Abbey Road' released 57 years ago
events.blurb: The Beatles released their iconic album 'Abbey Road' in the UK on September 26, 1969, featuring its famous zebra crossing cover.

angles.name: Abbey Road Anniversary
angles.copy: 57 years since The Beatles gave us 'Abbey Road'. That album cover is still one of the most recognisable in music history. What's your favourite track?

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: The Pretenders' lead singer and songwriter, Chrissie Hynde, celebrates her 75th birthday.

angles.name: Chrissie Hynde Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 75th birthday to the incomparable Chrissie Hynde! Her distinctive voice and fierce attitude with The Pretenders continue to rock.

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: Oasis frontman and Britpop icon, Liam Gallagher, celebrates his 54th birthday.

angles.name: Liam Gallagher Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 54th birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher! Still bringing the rock 'n' roll swagger. What's your favourite Liam moment?

events.title: John Lennon's 'Imagine' album released 55 years ago
events.blurb: John Lennon's iconic album 'Imagine', featuring the timeless title track, was released in the UK on October 8, 1971.

angles.name: Imagine Album Anniversary
angles.copy: 55 years since John Lennon released 'Imagine' in the UK. A powerful album with a message of peace that still resonates today.

events.title: First iPod announced 25 years ago
events.blurb: Apple unveiled the first-generation iPod on October 23, 2001, revolutionising portable music with '1,000 songs in your pocket'.

angles.name: iPod Anniversary
angles.copy: 25 years ago, Apple introduced the first iPod. It completely changed how we listen to music and paved the way for modern tech. Who remembers their first iPod?

events.title: Happy James Bond Day!
events.blurb: October 5th is celebrated as James Bond Day, marking the anniversary of the world premiere of the first Bond film, 'Dr. No', in 1962.

angles.name: James Bond Day
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! Celebrating the iconic 007 and decades of thrilling espionage, gadgets, and unforgettable theme tunes. What's your favourite Bond film or song?

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: Today would have been the 86th birthday of The Beatles' co-founder and peace activist, John Lennon.

angles.name: John Lennon Birthday Tribute
angles.copy: Remembering the visionary John Lennon on what would have been his 86th birthday. His music and message of peace live on.

events.title: John Cleese turns 87
events.blurb: The legendary comedian, actor, and writer John Cleese celebrates his 87th birthday.

angles.name: John Cleese Birthday
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 87th birthday to the brilliant John Cleese! From Monty Python to Fawlty Towers, a true master of comedy.

events.title: The Beatles' 'White Album' released 58 years ago
events.blurb: The Beatles released their ninth studio album, commonly known as 'The White Album', on November 22, 1968.

angles.name: White Album Anniversary
angles.copy: 58 years since The Beatles dropped 'The White Album'. A sprawling, experimental masterpiece that showed their incredible range. What's your standout track?
